_comment: Locked Gypsy script — candidate A throughout + per-virtue closings enabled. Source of truth for both the prototype HTML and the future D1 seed.
entry: Come in. Sit. The wind sent thee, and the wind does not waste its breath.
explanation: Eight cards lie between us. Eight ways a soul may stand. I shall lay them in pairs. Thou must choose. Not which is true — both are true. Only which is thine.
round_1_to_2: Four remain. The others are not lost — only set aside, for another to bear.
round_2_to_final: Two remain. Look at them. Breathe.
before_final: Now the last. Choose slowly. The card thou turnest down does not vanish — it will walk a step behind thee all thy days, as faithful as the one thou turnest up.
whisper: Find the king. He is looking for thee.

closing.honesty: Honesty. Moonglow's lamps burn for thee tonight. Go and see the world clearly.
closing.compassion: Compassion. There is a wounded thing on the road to Britain. Find it before another does.
closing.valor: Valor. The isles of Jhelom have a place at the table. Sit there unflinching.
closing.justice: Justice. The yews of Yew lean toward thee already. Stand straight beneath them.
closing.sacrifice: Sacrifice. There is a forge in Minoc that has been cold too long. It waits for thy hand.
closing.honor: Honor. The gates of Trinsic open for those who kneel before they enter. Kneel.
closing.spirituality: Spirituality. Skara Brae's mists know thy name already. Walk softly there.
closing.humility: Humility. New Magincia keeps no kings. Thou shalt be welcome.
